data.body: READINESS RESOLUTION round (Joe's 8 responses). (1) DELETED the 9 stale pre-three-pass child stories of 5fd2; RE-DECOMPOSED into 11 new children reflecting the converged design (DET floor; registry+orchestrator-on-engine; Pass-1 finder; Pass-2 aggregate verifier; Pass-3 deterministic; overlays; attestation; claim; REVIEW_RESULT sidecar; standing eval suite + ISF; docs) — all pass check-ac + clarity. (2) 5fd2 now depends_on 6f2d (workflow remediation; alias soupy-spool-revel) — Joe to brainstorm it in another session. (3) eval = epic work, NOT a blocker (it's an AC, not a prereq gate) — noted. (4) DET-floor-as-separate-epic = OPEN (recommended a shared prereq epic reusable by code-review; currently 5fd2 child 012e flagged as extraction candidate). (5) ISF (intent-source-fidelity) APPROVED -> added to criteria_v8 (32) + guard; marked approved in 6f2d. (6) plan-before-judge = FUTURE TUNING not MVP (checklist[] already supplies the eval plan) — updated 6f2d. (7) F1-F12 = the prose follow-on register in 5fd2; 'filing' = creating each as a tracked ticket (F10 already promoted into the eval suite) — explained to Joe. (8) cost re-derivation NOT needed (Pass-1=original design, Pass-3=deterministic, Pass-2=one bounded aggregate non-frontier call) — closed. Commits bb7e896d (ISF) + the children/links in the store.
